intro: Import the Streamer.bot package and attach its Intake action to the scene-change triggers first. Then refresh action names, approve only the target actions you intend to run, and edit the scene mappings below.

sections.title: 1. Providers
sections.description: Choose which connected streaming apps may activate mappings.

sections.title: 2. Scene mappings
sections.description: Bind each exact scene name to one creator-approved Streamer.bot action.

sections.title: 3. Safety and testing
sections.description: Prevent duplicate events, action loops, and accidental Trigger Test execution.
